name: Madison
content: Despite being the namesake of the county in which Huntsville is located, Madison is really just a suburb of Huntsville at this point. I don’t think Madison has an actual downtown. It’s mostly just an infinitely rolling suburb; the purgatory of urban planning. I once walked through Madison Probably as the first person to do so since 1965., traveling from nowhere through nowhere to arrive at nowhere past forgettable gated communities and strip malls that were easier to look past than look at, surrounded by people in cars hurriedly believing they were going somewhere and people in gated communities hurriedly believing they were living someplace, yet I could see none of those people behind their walls of plywood, steel, and glass: I was entirely alone. Oh, except for the six cop cars with lights on parked outside one of the houses in a gated community.
